title: Disable Monday.com email tracking pixel/gif
excerpt:
Hi, 
Whenever we send an email from CommuniHub it’s appending a tracking pixel that looks like the one below.  Our users are security conscious and don’t want to see that their emails are tracked.  Is there a way to disa…

posts.author: mpeters (Matt Peters)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Whenever we send an email from CommuniHub it’s appending a tracking pixel that looks like the one below. Our users are security conscious and don’t want to see that their emails are tracked. Is there a way to disable this tracking?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
in settings you can remove the monday.com branding/footer

Screen Shot 2021-06-09 at 10.56.00 AM1170×530 26.4 KB

Screen Shot 2021-06-09 at 10.55.26 AM1218×1408 72.1 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
@timlittletech is correct. However you may only remove the branding if you are on the Pro or Enterprise licensing plans with monday.

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Removing the branding does not remove the tracking pixel. That’s a separate function and to the best of my knowledge, there is no way currently to turn it off.
